scenarios.name: Engine Failure at 500ft
scenarios.description: Complete engine failure after takeoff. Pitch for 65 KIAS best glide, find a field.
scenarios.briefing: After takeoff at 500ft AGL, engine quits. Do NOT turn back to the runway. Pitch for 65 KIAS, pick the best field ahead ±30°.

scenarios.name: Engine Failure in Cruise
scenarios.description: Engine fails during cruise flight. You have altitude to work with.
scenarios.briefing: Engine will fail randomly during cruise. Maintain 65 KIAS glide, try restart: carb heat, fuel selector BOTH, mixture rich, magnetos check. If no restart, pick a field.

scenarios.name: Electrical Failure
scenarios.description: Alternator fails, battery drains. Shed electrical load, land soon.
scenarios.briefing: Alternator fails — ammeter shows discharge. Shed load: turn off non-essential (autopilot, #2 radio, lights). Battery lasts ~30min. Land at nearest airport.

scenarios.name: Partial Panel (Vacuum Failure)
scenarios.description: Vacuum pump fails — attitude indicator and heading indicator lost.
scenarios.briefing: Vacuum pump failure. AI tumbles, HI precesses. Use turn coordinator + compass + airspeed for attitude reference. 'No pitch, no bank, no yank.'

scenarios.name: Pitot Blockage (Icing)
scenarios.description: Pitot tube ices over — airspeed unreliable.
scenarios.briefing: Airspeed reading is wrong. Use pitch + power settings you know: level cruise ~2300 RPM, descent ~1800 RPM, climb ~full power 10° nose up. Turn on pitot heat.

scenarios.name: Engine Fire
scenarios.description: Engine fire in flight. Execute the emergency checklist immediately.
scenarios.briefing: MIXTURE — idle cutoff. FUEL SELECTOR — OFF. MASTER — OFF. CABIN HEAT/AIR — OFF. Airspeed 100 KIAS (or Vfe if flaps needed). Forced landing.

scenarios.name: Strong Crosswind Landing
scenarios.description: 15kt crosswind on approach. Use crab or wing-low method.
scenarios.briefing: Strong crosswind from the left. Use wing-low method: aileron into wind, opposite rudder to align with runway. Touch down on upwind wheel first.

scenarios.name: Stall Recovery Practice
scenarios.description: Practice power-off and power-on stall recoveries.
scenarios.briefing: Power-off stall: reduce power, raise nose, at buffet/horn — pitch down, full power, level off. Minimize altitude loss. Repeat with power-on stall at climb attitude.

scenarios.name: Go-Around from 200ft
scenarios.description: Practice missed approach and go-around procedure.
scenarios.briefing: On final at 200ft, runway obstructed. FULL POWER. Carb heat OFF. Pitch for Vy (74 KIAS). Flaps 20°→10°→UP incrementally. Climb, fly the pattern again.

scenarios.name: Double Failure
scenarios.description: Two random failures at random times. Stay calm, prioritize.
scenarios.briefing: Two unknown failures will occur during the flight. Aviate, Navigate, Communicate. Handle each emergency by the book.
